description_long: This is a tall, disposable coffee cup with a fitted dark gray plastic lid, commonly used for takeaway beverages in urban environments. The cup's exterior is decorated with a scenic, stylized landscape featuring orange and black silhouettes of mountains, trees, and a subtle sky gradient, evoking a sunset or sunrise. The lid has a small drinking spout and a slightly raised rim, typical of modern to-go cups. The cup tapers smoothly from a wide rim to a narrower base, making it easy to hold and fit into standard cup holders. The artwork wraps continuously around the cup, with no visible branding or text. The surface appears smooth and matte, with a hard, slightly glossy plastic lid and a paper or coated cardboard body.
description: A tall, disposable coffee cup with a dark gray plastic lid and a scenic orange-black mountain landscape design wrapping around its smooth, matte exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's wide rim, dark gray lid, and a prominent orange mountain peak with silhouetted trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the cup, revealing more of the landscape artwork with additional mountain silhouettes and tree details.
description_view_2: The cup is seen with the mountain peak centered, and the tree silhouettes are more pronounced against the orange gradient.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite side of the cup, with the mountain artwork curving around and the sky gradient visible above the dark tree line.
